title: dichanthelium polyanthes
intro: Dichanthelium polyanthes, also known as bent grass or bent panicle grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the Americas. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Dichanthelium polyanthes can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
